description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a deep maroon cover, bordered by a thin, light-colored line forming a rectangular frame on both the front and back. The front cover features a stylized, circular emblem resembling a dragon or serpent, rendered in a faint, goldish hue. The book's title is prominently displayed in ornate, medieval-style white lettering above the emblem. The spine is also maroon, with the title running vertically and a decorative circular motif at the top and bottom. The book appears to be well-crafted, with a slightly worn texture suggesting frequent handling. There are no visible dust jackets or publisher logos, and the book exudes a mysterious, fantasy-themed aesthetic.
description: A thick, maroon hardbound book with ornate white lettering and a faint gold emblem on the cover, bordered by a light frame. The spine features vertical title text and decorative motifs, giving it a fantasy-themed appearance.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the ornate title, a faint gold emblem, and a light border frame.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the top edge, revealing its thickness and the separation between the covers and pages.
description_view_2: The back cover is shown, plain maroon with only the light border frame and no text or illustration.
description_view_3: The spine is visible, displaying the vertical title text and decorative circular motifs at the top and bottom.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a faint, circular emblem resembling a dragon or serpent, rendered in a subtle goldish tone. The illustration is stylized and blends into the maroon background, giving the book a mysterious, fantasy-themed appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is maroon with the title 'Stone Book' written vertically in ornate white text. Decorative circular motifs are present at both the top and bottom of the spine, adding a fantasy touch.
